name: milvus
explanation: Milvus is a vector database that natively exposes Prometheus metrics on a fixed, well-known endpoint. The check inherits OpenMetricsBaseCheckV2 and ships only the standard `instances/openmetrics` template with `openmetrics_endpoint` defaulting to http://localhost:9091/metrics (Milvus' documented Prometheus port and path). No credentials are required and the path is a single canonical /metrics — Pattern A (OpenMetrics on a known port). A generic OpenMetrics port scan against 9091 with path /metrics, validating Prometheus exposition format with milvus_*-prefixed series, is sufficient to autodiscover.
notes: Pattern A: OpenMetrics on a known port (9091) with fixed /metrics path; no auth in the default deployment. No auto_conf.yaml ships, but the spec template is unambiguous.
